title: Flower Adornments for Armor
description: Use vines and flowers to adorn your armor at a Smithing Table.
body:
This pack allows you to adorn your armor with flowers using the Smithing Table. To do so, insert a Vine in the template slot, and insert a valid flower in the material slot. The valid flowers are as such:

- Dandelion
- Poppy
- Blue Orchid
- Allium
- Azure Bluet
- Cornflower
- Pink Petals
- Torchflower
- Flowering Azalea
- Mangrove Propagule
- Wither Rose

# Installation #
This pack requires both the **(Data)** *and* the **(Assets)** pack to function correctly. Install the **(Assets)** resource pack to your client, and the **(Data)** data pack to your world.

This pack was made for Minecraft version 1.20 and later. If you are playing 1.19.4, make sure your world has the **Update 1.20** experiment enabled.
